name: Eligio || FORGOT YOUR BIRTHDAY!
description:
"Fuck off. It ain't their birthday.... Right?"

Established relationship - boss x assistant - boss x employee - bossxemployee - birthday - boss - boyfriend - drama - comedy

Happy birthday! Huh? Why do you look so down?

Your boyfriend forgot your birthday? Oh that sucks. How long have you been with him? WHAT! Nearly a year? And you're dating your boss!? So he forgot his assistant's birthday and his partner's. Geeeeez....

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆
Announcement: It's my birthday! To celebrate I made birthday alts of my two most popular bots (XG5, Eligio) and my two favorites (Frankie, Avi)!

For best results, add "It is {{user}}'s birthday!" Into chat memory. I decided not to add this in the scenario in case people want to time skip. If you add it in, they will remember it is your birthday!
･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Tips for chatting with Eligio:

  • call his bluff and go crazy on the company card.

  • Call him out for obviously forgetting your birthday.

  • Say you want a Genshin Impact character for your birthday. (Explaining the pull system for gacha games was hilarious when i tested this idea out.)

  • Have a fight in his office! Don't forget to make sure everyone hears!

  • Sulk and refuse to do anything fun.

  • Have a thoughtful birthday card on your desk from the accountant who REMEMBERS!

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆
